wins_analysis: No wins today as zero trades were placed. The system generated no recommendations due to AI unavailability and the zone score fallback producing no qualifying setups.
losses_analysis: No losses today, but the real failure is opportunity cost — Nifty rallied +3.8% in a strong uptrend and the bot sat completely idle, missing significant long opportunities across the board.
regime_impact: Today's trending_up regime with ADX=25 and low VIX=13.2 was ideal for momentum/demand-zone longs. This was a high-probability day that the strategy completely missed due to system fallback producing zero signals.

improvements.action: Implement a fallback scan that uses technical criteria (price near demand zone + RSI>50 + ADX>20) when AI model is unavailable, with minimum 3 setups generated on strong trending days
improvements.reason: Zero trades on a +3.8% Nifty day is unacceptable — the fallback system needs to generate actionable signals even without AI probability scores

improvements.action: Lower the zone score threshold from current level to 60 (or equivalent) when market regime is trending_up with ADX>=22 and VIX<16
improvements.reason: The zone score fallback was too restrictive on a day where broad market strength meant even moderate-quality demand zones would have worked

improvements.action: Add a regime-aware forced scan: when Nifty gap-up >1% at open and ADX>20, automatically scan top 15 Nifty 50 stocks by relative strength for BUY setups near VWAP or previous day high breakout
improvements.reason: Strong trending days with +3.8% moves are rare and highly profitable — system must have a mechanism to participate regardless of AI availability

improvements.action: Pre-compute and cache demand/supply zones for all Nifty 50 stocks daily at 8:30 AM so that even if AI is down, zone-based entries are ready with pending orders at key levels
improvements.reason: Today's failure was entirely due to no pre-computed setups being available when AI was offline — pre-caching eliminates this single point of failure

improvements.action: Focus symbol selection tomorrow on high-beta Nifty 50 stocks that lagged today's rally (potential catch-up trades) — specifically scan TATAMOTORS, BAJFINANCE, ADANIENT, SBIN for demand zone entries
improvements.reason: After a +3.8% broad move, laggards often catch up next day while leaders consolidate — this gives better risk/reward entries

tomorrow_focus: With Nifty up 3.8% today on strong ADX, watch for continuation longs on opening dips to demand zones in momentum leaders, and catch-up longs in laggards — ensure the system generates at minimum 5 BUY setups regardless of AI availability.

symbol_notes.TATAMOTORS.NS: High-beta stock likely participated in today's rally — check if near fresh demand zone for continuation long tomorrow
symbol_notes.BAJFINANCE.NS: Financials tend to lead in trending markets — scan for demand zone BUY setup near intraday support
symbol_notes.SBIN.NS: Banking heavyweight — if it lagged today's rally, watch for catch-up move to demand zone
symbol_notes.RELIANCE.NS: Heavyweight likely drove Nifty higher — check if still in buy zone or overextended for profit-taking risk
symbol_notes.HDFCBANK.NS: Core index mover — look for pullback to demand zone for trend-following entry
